description: Protected MMD final-run notebooks and their required result dependencies. Files are referenced at their existing paths; nothing is duplicated. See docs/REFERENCE_RESULTS_MANIFEST.md.

notes: The corrected notebook also references gitignored scratch checkpoints (results/*_checkpoint.csv) used only for resume during its own execution; they are not required to support the recorded conclusions.
The 20 tracked PNGs under experiments-analysis/figures/ are OUTPUTS of the corrected notebook, not inputs; they are preserved in git but not hash-pinned here.
The corrected notebook imports the legacy flat modules 'datasets' and 'diffusion' from the repository root; those modules must remain importable for the notebook to be re-runnable.
